hero.title: MetOcean DSS
hero.meta: Registered on CIVD System: SPDA Number 73970/EMP/2024

sections.lead: For maritime industry, those parameters are meteorology and oceanography (metocean) parameters. As the expansion of maritime industries, reliable metocean parameters information are considered a remarkable matter.
sections.body: Some operational information is critically dependent on accurate metocean parameters information. If we don’t have this information, when bad weather, say, a storm comes, we will not have any idea what kind of decision we have to take to save our assets. A better decision can be taken if we have predicted such bad weather. Predicted weather condition can give great basic knowledge for all decision makers. Thus, we can prevent the damage and reduce the loss.
sections.kicker: Natural condition uncertainties come with every man-made plan in maritime activities.

items.title: Marine Sea State Prediction (7 Days Ahead)
items.description: Prognosis of 7-days ahead winds, waves, swells, and currents. The prognosis is based on downscaling method using Weather Research and Forecasting model (WRF), in-house hydrodynamic model, and WaveWatch III.

items.title: Marine Sea State Prediction (10 Days Ahead)
items.description: Prognosis of 10-days ahead winds, waves, swells, and currents. The prognosis is based on downscaling method using Weather Research and Forecasting model (WRF), in-house hydrodynamic model, and WaveWatch III.

items.title: Climatology Analysis
items.description: Analysis of historical climate data for specific marine locations; detailing winds, waves, currents, and tidal patterns.

items.title: Weather Window
items.description: Analysis of operation window and assessment of down time (work standby) probability.

sections.title: Offshore and Coastal Navigation Decision Making
sections.description: Make informed decisions through accurate analysis and expert guidance, for safer operations, optimized performance, and cost-efficient protection of marine assets.

items.title: MetOcean Design Criteria
items.description: Extreme Value Analysis. Numerical Simulation. Ocean, Climate and Weather Analysis

items.title: MetOcean DSS
items.description: Marine Sea State Prediction. Weather Forecast. Tow Route Forecast. Weather Window.

items.title: Extended Services
items.description: Our team can provide customized services tailored for your specific needs in maritime industry.
